GLUCOSE Platform

See GLUCOSE in Action

Watch how autonomous AI agents transform customer engagement across industries, channels, and use cases.

Request Demo Watch demos
Overview

Meet GLUCOSE

The complete autonomous brand engagement platform

Discover GLUCOSE, our intuitive and reliable conversational Agentic-AI platform. See how it redefines customer engagement, enabling brands to autonomously enhance and personalize product experiences at scale.

Watch full demo
Multimodal AI

Visual Understanding

Resolving customer issues faster with multimodal AI understanding

GLUCOSE processes images and visual input to diagnose issues in real-time. Watch as it identifies a warning light on a vehicle dashboard and guides the user through resolution steps via WhatsApp.

Watch full demo
Sales Automation

Seamless Conversions

Converting interest into booked test drives autonomously

Transform interest into action. GLUCOSE contextually highlights key features based on customer preferences and seamlessly books test drive appointments, all within a natural conversation flow.

Watch full demo
Voice AI

Natural Voice Understanding

Turning negative experiences into brand loyalty moments

Handle complex voice interactions with empathy. Watch GLUCOSE process voice messages from a frustrated customer, understand context and emotion, and deliver helpful, calming responses.

Watch full demo
Customer Lifecycle

Ownership Support

Reducing support cost while increasing service booking rates

Support customers throughout their entire ownership journey. GLUCOSE autonomously diagnoses issues, provides guidance, and books service appointments directly via Telegram and other messaging platforms.

Watch full demo
The Pod

Deep Dive into GLUCOSE

Insights from founders on agentic AI and customer engagement

Join 5.Y's founders for an in-depth conversation about the future of customer engagement, the technology behind GLUCOSE, and how agentic AI is transforming enterprise customer experiences.

Watch full episode

Ready to transform your customer experience?

See how GLUCOSE can help your enterprise deliver autonomous brand experiences that reach every customer, in every moment that matters.
